# Code RED Decompiled Source Export
# Source: related_apps/code_red_sccl_attempt_bundle_v1/code_red_sccl_windows_build_kit_v1/compile_vehicle_menu_probe_windows.ps1
# SHA1: 2efc922aaa6cabfe66cced0fa95ceccc08b9df97
# Export type: source/text copy

$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$KitDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
$BundleDir = Resolve-Path (Join-Path $KitDir '..')
$LabDir = Join-Path $BundleDir 'code_red_script_compile_lab_v1'
$OutBase = Join-Path $KitDir 'output'
$OutDir = Join-Path $OutBase 'vehicle_menu_probe_build'
$LogFile = Join-Path $OutBase 'compile_vehicle_menu_probe_ps.log'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $OutBase | Out-Null

$Candidates = @(
    (Join-Path $OutBase 'SC-CL.exe'),
    (Join-Path $KitDir 'SC-CL.exe'),
    (Join-Path $BundleDir 'SC-CL.exe')
)
$ScclExe = $Candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -Last 1
if (-not $ScclExe) { throw "SC-CL.exe not found. Run build_sccl_windows.bat first." }

$SrcFile = Join-Path $LabDir 'src\main.c'
$IncludeDir = Join-Path $LabDir 'include'
if (!(Test-Path $SrcFile)) { throw "Source file not found at $SrcFile" }
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $OutDir | Out-Null

"Compiler: $ScclExe" | Set-Content -Path $LogFile
"Source: $SrcFile" | Add-Content -Path $LogFile
"Include: $IncludeDir" | Add-Content -Path $LogFile
& $ScclExe `
  '-target=RDR_#SC' `
  '-platform=X360' `
  '-name=codered_vehicle_menu_probe' `
  "-out-dir=$OutDir" `
  "-extra-arg=-I$IncludeDir" `
  $SrcFile 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath $LogFile -Append
